description.overview: A small, fluffy white dog bred as a companion. Japanese Spitz are cheerful, loyal family dogs with a beautiful coat and expressive dark eyes.
description.history: The Japanese Spitz originated in Japan.
description.temperament: Known for being playful, alert, intelligent.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, stand-off double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A small, fluffy white dog bred as a companion. Japanese Spitz are cheerful, loyal family dogs with a beautiful coat and expressive dark eyes.
